content.rendered:
Best Eye Hospital in Kochi, Kerala

Trusted Eye Care Centres in Kochi

Giridhar Eye Institute ensures that each branch is strategically located to serve the diverse regions of Kochi, minimizing travel time for patients. The Kadavanthra branch, being centrally located, is easily reachable via major city roads and public transport. Edappally’s proximity to NH66 and the Kochi Metro makes it accessible for those coming from northern areas. The Mattancherry clinic caters to the western coastal community, while the Thripunithura branch serves the southern suburbs.

The main branch at Kadavanthra provides 24×7 emergency eye care, ensuring immediate attention to urgent cases. Additionally, GEI’s commitment to community health is evident through its outreach programs, including free surgeries and eye camps, enhancing accessibility for underprivileged populations.

Kadavanthra

  • giridhareye@gmail.com

  • 91-484-417 0000

  • 8:00 am to 6:00 pm

  • 0484 – 2221432

  • 9:00 am to 4:30 pm

Edappally

  • edappally@giridhareye.org

  • 8:30 am to 5:00 pm

Thripunithura
  • Giridhar Eye Institute, Aradhana, Building, Opp. Pooja Cricket, ground, Hospital road, Thripunithura-682 301, India

  • thripunithura@giridhareye.org

  • +91-484-291 8001

  • 8:30 am to 5:00 pm

Giridhar Eye Institute stands out as a top eye hospital in Kochi with multiple accessible branches, making it a preferred destination for comprehensive and specialized eye care services in Kerala. Whether you’re searching for the best eye specialist in Kochi, reliable cataract surgery, or advanced treatments for glaucoma, retina, or corneal disorders, GEI ensures expert consultation and state-of-the-art facilities. With its branches in Kadavanthra, Edappally, Thripunithura, and Mattancherry, patients can find quality eye treatment near them without having to travel far. The hospital’s strategic locations, combined with experienced ophthalmologists and patient-centric care, have made Giridhar Eye Institute a trusted name in Kerala’s eye care landscape.
